reviews.review_title: A must have for retro computer lovers
reviews.review_description: Very well made. This was very much needed. Playing with a C64 with your Quest controllers feels amazingly smooth and cool. Even better than on a flat screen. Also being able to dig inside the machine and learn retrocumputing it´s so cool. This is the first app to bring a C64 into VR. Awesome.

This is the easiest way to play your Retro Game on the Quest 3 right now. With a beautiful interface you image your in your bedroom with a CRT monitor or sat on the bed with a gameboy. 

Easy to transfer roms. Simple to play and pick up with the touch controllers. Brings so many memories back.

If its Nintendo, Sony or Sega this has it all and even C64. 

I have a Full setup guide and review over on my YT channel. This is a must buy.

I use EmuVR on PC a lot and someone on their server brought this game up in one of the chats so I had to check it out; glad I did. Not only can you play your retro games in VR but the real difference with this and similar apps is that its designed to teach you about the consoles and how they work and I really think the idea of making your own basic retro games to run on these systems in VR is a cool idea. I'll be very interested to see how this develops, but so far; its worth supporting 100%.

There was once this game that only pcvr people could play called EmuVR and it’s still up to this day but if you don’t feel like getting a pc or you just don’t want to be on your pc in that moment this game is for you. I’ve joined the discord and the staff is amazing. They’re all talking about adding more consoles and fixes to the game. One of the consoles being my favorite which is the Nintendo 64. You can also emulate games from websites which I find amazing. The consoles are gameboy, gameboy advanced, game boy color, and waaaay more. 10/10 must buy!

The best place on Quest to use your favorite retro emulators, with a great bedroom environment with multiple spots and screens to play on, an easy to use interface and menu system, awesome learning tools and C64 creation tools, and NOW a fantastic MR mode where you can take the screen, or gameboy (!) anywhere in your own environment! Super nice dev that is constantly providing great updates to improve what was already great.

Brilliant retro games app - really nice environments and easy to upload roms - would love to be able to map buttons on quest controllers to play smoothly as controls for snes games especially beat em ups arent great , would love to have support for bluetooth gamepads etc - but overall a really solid retro gaming experience- love the clock which has real time in it and all the retro memorabilia around the room

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review, really glad you're enjoying the environment and the little touches like the real-time clock!
Good news on controls: Bluetooth gamepads are already supported, so you can pair one for SNES beat 'em ups. I've also added custom controller mapping to my to-do list.
If you have any trouble getting a gamepad working, join my Discord (link at retrogamedev.com) and I'll help you sort it. Cheers!
